rationale: The plan achieves the cycle-1 objective strictly within the bounds of the pre-review and repository trust model. Its zero-dependency, read-only constraints are rigorously defined and mechanically enforced by dedicated oracles (test-readonly, test-boundary). The deferral of node-backed retirement prevents speculative schema invention while providing a deterministic, verifiable short-circuit (UNREPRESENTABLE_CURRENT_AUTHORITY_REFLECTION). The treatment of active_plan content addressing through disk-resolution and the clear separation between file-level ingestion fail-states versus entry-level validation verdicts leave no remaining structural contradictions.
